# RawType

> RawType is a free browser-based typing test and typing practice game for improving WPM, CPM, accuracy, and consistency with prose and random word drills.

Website: https://rawtype.net/
Sitemap: https://rawtype.net/sitemap.xml
Primary language: English
Also available: German

## Key Pages

- Home: https://rawtype.net/
- Free typing test: https://rawtype.net/typing-test/
- Typing practice: https://rawtype.net/typing-practice/
- WPM test: https://rawtype.net/wpm-test/
- Word Mode typing drills: https://rawtype.net/word-mode/
- German Tipptrainer: https://rawtype.net/de/tipptrainer/
- German Tippgeschwindigkeit test: https://rawtype.net/de/tippgeschwindigkeit-test/

## Product Summary

RawType helps players practice typing with two main modes:

- Typing Classic uses prose-like text for rhythm, punctuation, capitalization, and sentence flow.
- Word Mode creates random word drills with selectable word count, difficulty, and optional No Mistake Mode.

RawType measures WPM, CPM, accuracy, progress, mistakes, duration, completed words, and account-saved typing history when a player signs in.

## Suggested Descriptions

- Short: Free typing test and practice game for WPM, accuracy, prose, and word drills.
- German: Kostenloser Tipptrainer fuer Tippgeschwindigkeit, Genauigkeit, Prosa und Wortuebungen.
